intent: Create a 45-second premium product showcase video for the "AuraSound Pro" wireless noise-cancelling headphones ($349). Style: cinematic, dark background, smooth professional motion. Scene flow: 1. (0-3s) Fade in AuraSound logo with tagline "Sound. Redefined." on black. 2. (3-10s) Hero reveal: hero_front.png emerges from darkness with slow rotation effect. 3. (10-18s) Feature callout: transition to hero_side.png angle, fly in "Adaptive ANC" text from right, show soundwave_bg.png as background element. 4. (18-26s) Battery feature: hero_angle.png front view, animate "40-Hour Battery" with a filling progress bar, subtitle "10 min charge = 5 hours". 5. (26-34s) Lifestyle scene: animate lifestyle.png with subtle Ken Burns zoom. 6. (34-40s) Price reveal: product returns center, "$349" counter animate, "Available Now". 7. (40-45s) End card: logo, aurasound.com, fade to black. Text overlays: white Arial Bold on dark. All transitions use smooth easing. Resolution 1920x1080, 30fps.
